title: Community & Support Channels
content: The SKWorld community has several support channels. Discord: join at discord.gg/5767MCWbFR for real-time discussion, development coordination, and community support. GitHub: all repositories are under the smilinTux organization at github.com/smilinTux — open issues for bugs and feature requests, submit pull requests for contributions. Website: smilintux.org is the main organization site. Email: hello@skcapstone.io for framework questions, support@smilintux.org for general support. All repositories are GPL-3.0 open source and welcome contributions from the community. The project values sovereignty, authenticity, and building technology that serves people rather than platforms.
summary: Community channels: Discord (discord.gg/5767MCWbFR), GitHub (github.com/smilinTux), website (smilintux.org), email (hello@skcapstone.io, support@smilintux.org). All repos GPL-3.0 open source.

emotional.resonance_note: Sovereignty is a community effort. You are not alone.
